sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hopEnd (event_time DateTime, value UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
INSERT INTO test_hopEnd VALUES (now(), 1), (now() - INTERVAL '1' DAY, 2), (now() - INTERVAL '2' DAY, 3);
SELECT hopEnd(event_time, INTERVAL '1' DAY, INTERVAL '2' DAY) AS end_time FROM test_hopEnd;
UPDATE test_hopEnd SET value = value + 10 WHERE hopEnd(event_time, INTERVAL '1' DAY, INTERVAL '2' DAY) > now();
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_hopEnd WHERE hopEnd(event_time, INTERVAL '1' DAY, INTERVAL '2' DAY) < now();
